description: Collects data for heatmaps and clickmaps displayed in the Piwik PRO Site Inspector Chrome extension. Heatmaps show where users clicked on a page; clickmaps show details about clicked elements. Only one heatmap & clickmap tag per site or app. Requires a click trigger.

when_to_use: Visualizing where users click on pages
Analyzing click patterns for UX optimization
Understanding which elements get the most interaction
Heatmap and clickmap reports in Site Inspector

disable_in_debug_mode.description: Disable when Tag Manager is in debug mode

all_clicks.description: Track all clicks on any page
all_clicks.prerequisite: Create a click trigger without conditions to track all clicks. Use triggers_list() to find or triggers_create() to create one.

specific_clicks.description: Track clicks on specific elements (e.g. buttons, links)
specific_clicks.prerequisite: Create a click trigger with conditions (e.g. element matches selector) for specific elements.

common_mistakes: Using a page view trigger instead of a click trigger (only click triggers work)
Adding more than one heatmap tag per site/app

no_data_in_site_inspector: Verify a click trigger is attached (not page view)
Allow ~2 hours for data to appear
Install Piwik PRO Site Inspector Chrome extension
tag_not_firing: Heatmaps tag requires a click trigger - verify trigger type
Ensure trigger conditions match your pages
